title: Insider Threat, Security, and Interagency Records Concerning Kash Patel

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

ODNI / DNI FOIA REQUEST 

To: Office of the Director of National Intelligence (ODNI)
Subject: FOIA Request – Insider Threat, Security, and Interagency Records Concerning Kash Patel

Request

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, 5 U.S.C. § 552, I request the following records:

1. Insider Threat Program Records (IC-Level)

All records maintained by ODNI, the National Counterintelligence and Security Center (NCSC), or any IC Insider Threat Program entity, including:

Alerts, referrals, or incident reports referencing Kash Patel
Behavioral or risk-based indicators, including any concerns related to impairment or alcohol use
Insider Threat Working Group communications involving the subject

2. Security Clearance / Adjudicative Records

All records relating to:

Security clearance reviews, adjudications, reinvestigations, or incident reports
Any flags, concerns, or reporting related to conduct, reliability, or judgment
Continuous evaluation (CE) or vetting system alerts

3. Interagency Communications

All communications between ODNI and:

Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI)
Department of Justice (including JMD, OIG, OPR)
Any Intelligence Community elements

…relating to concerns, allegations, or reporting tied to the subject matter described in the recent article published by The Atlantic.

4. Media-Triggered Review or Response

Any records reflecting:

Internal discussions of the The Atlantic article
Any review, inquiry, or risk assessment initiated in response to media reporting involving Kash Patel
Records Systems to Be Searched

This request explicitly includes:

Insider Threat Program systems and reporting databases
Continuous Evaluation (CE) and vetting systems
ODNI and NCSC email systems (including archived email)
Intelligence Community shared platforms and coordination systems
Search Terms

At a minimum:

“Kash Patel”
“Patel AND alcohol”
“Patel AND impairment”
“Patel AND insider threat”
“Patel AND clearance”
“Patel AND conduct”
'Patel AND Atlantic"
Date Range

January 1, 2024 – Present

Requested Action
Conduct a de novo review of all responsive records
Release all non-exempt and segregable portions
Provide a Vaughn index for any withheld material
Identify all systems searched and custodians queried
Format

Produce in Electronic (.pdf), via email

Fee Waiver

Requester qualifies as a news media requester. Disclosure is in the public interest as it directly relates to the integrity, security, and reliability of individuals operating within or adjacent to the Intelligence Community.

Expedited Processing

Requested due to:

Active national media reporting
Potential national security implications tied to Insider Threat frameworks
Urgent public interest in clearance adjudication integrity

Related News Article cited:
https://www.theatlantic.com/politics/2026/04/kash-patel-fbi-director-drinking-absences/686839/

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

William Fernandes

To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Arkansas Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) Request  
City of Wynne, Arkansas – City Clerk’s Office  
P.O. Box 607  
Wynne, AR 72396  

Copy via certified mail, e-mail, or hand-delivery to:  
• Cross County Judge’s Office  
• Cross County Sheriff’s Office (Jail & Detention Facility)  
• Wynne Police Department  
• Wynne City Council (Mayor and Council Members)  
• Cross County Quorum Court  
• City of Wynne City Attorney  
• Cross County Prosecuting Attorney  

RE: Comprehensive FOIA Request – All Records Relating to “Reed v. City of Wynne,” plus Related Matters (2000-Present)

Dear FOIA Custodian:

Pursuant to the Arkansas Freedom of Information Act, Ark. Code Ann. § 25-19-101 et seq., I respectfully request access to, and copies of, the records described below. This request encompasses all responsive records in the possession, custody, or control of the City of Wynne, Cross County, and any of their departments, divisions, boards, commissions, law-enforcement agencies, jail or detention facilities, risk-management offices, insurers, elected officials, employees, consultants, or agents.

1. “Reed v. City of Wynne” (any style, docket, or cause number)  
   a. All pleadings, motions, discovery, transcripts, exhibits, judgments, settlements, and court correspondence.  
   b. All investigative files, offense/incident reports, witness statements, interview recordings, photographs, videos, audio, physical evidence logs, chain-of-custody records, and forensic reports.  
   c. All communication—internal or external—related to the case, including e-mails, letters, memoranda, text messages, voicemail logs, phone records, meeting notes, agendas, or minutes.  
   d. All correspondence with insurers, risk-management entities, defense counsel, plaintiffs’ counsel, expert witnesses, or third-party vendors.

2. Civil or criminal cases, administrative claims, or grievances filed against any City of Wynne or Cross County agency, subdivision, employee, or elected official (including but not limited to the police department, sheriff’s office, jail/detention facility, or city council) from January 1, 2000 to present. Please include:  
   • Style of case; court/docket number; date filed and resolved; claim description; outcome; settlement amounts; indemnity paid; attorney fees; insurance information.  
   • Copies of all pleadings, investigative files, settlements, or releases.  
   • All related communications, as defined above.

3. Meetings and deliberations (2000-present)  
   • All agendas, minutes, recordings, notes, and attendance rosters for:  
     – Wynne City Council (regular, special, or emergency sessions)  
     – Cross County Quorum Court meetings  
     – City of Wynne boards, commissions, or committees  
     – “Behind-the-scenes” or non-public gatherings concerning the matters set forth above, including e-mails arranging such meetings or recapping their substance.

4. Insurance coverage (2000-present)  
   • All policies (liability, law-enforcement liability, public officials’ errors & omissions, excess/umbrella, etc.) applicable to the City of Wynne and Cross County, including declaration pages, limits, exclusions, endorsements, renewals, and cancellations.  
   • All claims files, reservation-of-rights letters, correspondence, and payments regarding “Reed v. City of Wynne” or any other claims listed in Item 2.

5. FOIA logs and correspondence  
   • All prior FOIA requests, subpoena requests, or discovery requests concerning “Reed v. City of Wynne” or the matters described above, with the agency’s responses.  
   • All internal deliberations about responding to such requests.

Format and Delivery  
• Please provide electronic copies (PDF for documents, MP4/AVI for video, WAV/MP3 for audio) via secure download link, e-mail, or USB drive.  
• If records exist only in hard copy, kindly notify me of the total page count and copying cost before duplication.

Exempt or Partially Exempt Material  
If you contend that any portion of the requested records is exempt under Arkansas law:  
1. Identify each withheld record or redacted portion.  
2. Cite the specific statutory exemption.  
3. Release all reasonably segregable non-exempt portions.

Fee Waiver / Cost Estimate  
Disclosure of these records will contribute significantly to public understanding of government operations and accountability. I therefore request a waiver or substantial reduction of duplication fees per Ark. Code Ann. § 25-19-105(d)(3)(A). If anticipated costs exceed \$50, please furnish a written cost estimate before incurring any charge.

Response Time  
Under Ark. Code Ann. § 25-19-105(a)(2)(A), the custodian must provide the records “immediately” or within three working days if they are in active use or storage. Please confirm receipt of this request and advise when and how the responsive records will be made available.

Preservation Notice  
Please preserve all potentially responsive records to prevent alteration, deletion, or destruction during the pendency of this request.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter. Should you have any questions, or require clarification to expedite processing, please contact me at [phone] or [e-mail].

Sincerely,



cc:  
• Mayor of Wynne, AR  
• Chief of Police, Wynne Police Department  
• Sheriff, Cross County Sheriff’s Office  
• Warden/Supervisor, Cross County Detention Facility  
• City Attorney, City of Wynne  
• County Attorney / Prosecuting Attorney, Cross County  
• Risk Management / Insurance Carrier(s)  

Enclosures: Copy of Ark. Code Ann. § 25-19-101 et seq. (optional)

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Christopher Reed

title: FEMA CITY OF WYNNE COUNTY OF CROSS

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

**RE: Freedom of Information Act Request**

Dear FOIA Officer,

Pursuant to the Arkansas Freedom of Information Act (Ark. Code Ann. § 25-19-101 et seq.), I am requesting access to and copies of all records, documents, communications, reports, and files in your possession concerning any investigations, cases, or actions involving:

- Cross County Sheriff’s Department  
- Cross County Detention Center  
- Wynne Police Department  
- City of Wynne  
- Any member, agent, or official of Cross County or City of Wynne government agencies

This request includes, but is not limited to, all documents, emails, internal memoranda, reports, evidence logs, body camera footage, audio/video files, and any other materials compiled, created, or maintained by your agency or its members that pertain to these topics.

Additionally, please include all records, evidence, and documents that may be used in any pending or anticipated civil rights lawsuit or litigation involving the entities or individuals mentioned above.

If any portion of the records is exempt from disclosure by law, please redact the exempt portions and provide the remaining non-exempt information. Also, please provide a written explanation for each redaction or withheld document, citing the statutory basis for the exemption.

If you expect any fees for searching or copying these records, please inform me in advance if the cost will exceed $[specify amount, e.g., $50.00]. As these records are being requested for possible use in a civil rights matter of public concern, I request a waiver or reduction of fees.

Please process this request as soon as possible. If you have any questions or need clarification, I can be reached at [your phone number] or [your email].

Thank you for your attention to this matter.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Christopher Reed
